new_claims.claim_text: US-Israeli strikes destroyed a prominent Iranian bridge.
new_claims.notes: Allegation of joint US-Israeli action and destruction of civilian infrastructure.

new_claims.claim_text: US policymakers are physically afraid of Israel and intelligence agencies.
new_claims.notes: Claim from Tucker Carlson regarding foreign influence on US policy.

new_claims.claim_text: Artemis II crew sent back a flat earth image.
new_claims.notes: Satirical or misleading claim challenging scientific consensus on Earth's shape.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump is blasting birthright citizenship, claiming the US is the only country stupid enough to allow it.
